message:
chore(audit): bump rustls-webpki to 0.103.13 (fixes RUSTSEC-2026-0098/0099/0104)

Three RUSTSEC vulnerabilities in rustls-webpki 0.103.10 (transitive
via reqwest): name-constraint wildcard acceptance, incorrect URI name
acceptance, reachable panic in CRL parsing. All fixed in 0.103.13.

`cargo audit` was failing CI. Patch bump — no API changes.

Remaining cargo-audit output is 4 `warning` advisories (atty
unmaintained, rand transitive unsoundness) which don't fail the audit
command but represent deeper transitive-dep work.
